item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
For all users who use KDE and Dolphin: Download and copy the file ClamAV-GUI.desktop into the folder "~/.local/share/kservices5/ServiceMenus" and in the context menu of Dolphin you will find the following entry: scan with Clam-AV. Now you can scan files or folders mit a right click.


[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
For all users who use KDE and Dolphin: Download and copy the file ClamAV-GUI.desktop into the folder "~/.local/share/kservices5/ServiceMenus" and in the context menu of Dolphin you will find the following entry: scan with Clam-AV. Now you can scan files or folders mit a right click.


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
For all users who use KDE and Dolphin: Download and copy the file ClamAV-GUI.desktop into the folder "~/.local/share/kservices5/ServiceMenus" and in the context menu of Dolphin you will find the following entry: scan with Clam-AV. Now you can scan files or folders mit a right click.


[read more]

item.title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:author: glitterware
item.itunes:summary:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.description:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]

item.title: SDM NEXT GEN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: SDM NEXT GEN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
SDM NEXT GEN
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is designed to streamline the device's operations, leading to smoother and faster user experience. By leveraging the power of Magisk, this module offers a convenient and effective way to enhance the capabilities of Snapdragon devices, making it a valuable tool for users seeking to maximize the potential of their devices.
Whether it's improving gaming performance, multitasking, or overall system responsiveness, this module is a versatile solution for optimizing Qualcomm Snapdragon devices.

The Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is a revolutionary tool for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. This Magisk module is specifically designed to optimize the gaming performance of your device, ensuring smoother gameplay and faster load times.

With this module, you can expect improved graphics, reduced lag, and overall enhanced gaming performance. Whether you're a casual gamer or a hardcore enthusiast, the Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is a must-have for anyone looking to take their gaming experience to the next level.

With its innovative technology and seamless integration, this module is a game-changer for mobile gamers.


In the dynamic realm of Android customization, users often seek ways to enhance their device's performance without compromising stability. The SDM Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module emerges as a powerful solution, offering advanced optimizations tailored for Snapdragon devices. This module, designed to complement the Magisk framework, takes performance tuning to the next level. Here's an exploration of its features, benefits, and frequently asked questions.

Features:
1. Smart Performance Tuning:The SDM Next Gen module intelligently optimizes the device's performance, adapting to varying workloads for a seamless experience.
2. Battery Efficiency: Experience improved battery life through targeted optimizations, ensuring a balance between performance and energy consumption.
3. GPU Boost: Unlock the full potential of your device's GPU for enhanced graphics performance, ideal for gaming and graphics-intensive applications.
4. Memory Management: Efficient memory utilization ensures smoother multitasking and overall system responsiveness.
5. Advanced Kernel Tweaks: Tailored kernel tweaks contribute to a more refined and stable performance without compromising the device's integrity.

Benefits:
1. Smoother User Experience: Enjoy a faster and more responsive user interface, thanks to optimized performance across various usage scenarios.
2. Extended Battery Life: The module's intelligent optimizations contribute to a more efficient use of resources, translating to longer battery endurance.
3. Gaming Performance: Gamers will appreciate the GPU boost, elevating the gaming experience with improved graphics rendering and smoother gameplay.
4. Stability and Reliability: SDM Next Gen Optimization is crafted with stability in mind, ensuring that optimizations enhance rather than disrupt the device's functionality.

FAQ:
Q1: Is this module compatible with all Snapdragon devices?
A: The module is designed for Snapdragon-powered devices, but compatibility may vary. It's recommended to check the developer's documentation for a list of supported devices.

Q2: Can I uninstall the module if I encounter issues?
A: Yes, the module can be easily uninstalled through the Magisk Manager app. Ensure to follow proper uninstallation procedures to avoid any potential issues.

Q3: Will this module void my warranty?
A: Generally, using Magisk modules does not void warranties. However, it's advisable to check your device's warranty terms and conditions for clarity.

Q4: How often should I update the module?
A: Check for updates periodically on the official repository. It's recommended to read release notes and follow any specific update instructions provided by the developer.

Unlock the full potential of your Snapdragon device with the SDM Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module – a performance-enhancing powerhouse for the Android enthusiast. Install, optimize, and elevate your mobile experience!
[read more]

SDM NEXT GEN
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is designed to streamline the device's operations, leading to smoother and faster user experience. By leveraging the power of Magisk, this module offers a convenient and effective way to enhance the capabilities of Snapdragon devices, making it a valuable tool for users seeking to maximize the potential of their devices.

item.itunes:title: Ai Gate [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.

[read more]

item.title: Free Product Label Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Free Product Label Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Free Product Label Maker
(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Efficient and reliable identity card and label maker software provides option to save a label design into different image file formats including gif, jpeg and jpg. Expertise CD label maker software generates beautiful label designs using graphical objects including line, rectangle, text, rectangle, circle, and ellipse. Specialized CD label and discount card designer software facilitates to generate bulk labels and cards using sequential value series, random series and constant value series techniques. Efficient CD label maker software facilitates print preview option to visualize actual printing. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. Reliable and simple ID card and CD label maker software creates card and label in few mouse clicks using card and label templates. Efficient ID card maker and CD label designer software provides option to save a design as a template for future use.Features:* Efficient and reliable CD label designer and identity card maker software provides attractive and interactive graphical interface for the windows end users.* Powerful CD label creator and business card designer software allow user to generate label and cards without any technical skill.* Innovative CD label creator software designs ID cards, tags, coupons and labels having any size and shape including rectangular and rounded rectangular efficiently.

[read more]
item.description:
Free Product Label Maker
(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Efficient and reliable identity card and label maker software provides option to save a label design into different image file formats including gif, jpeg and jpg. Expertise CD label maker software generates beautiful label designs using graphical objects including line, rectangle, text, rectangle, circle, and ellipse. Specialized CD label and discount card designer software facilitates to generate bulk labels and cards using sequential value series, random series and constant value series techniques. Efficient CD label maker software facilitates print preview option to visualize actual printing. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. Reliable and simple ID card and CD label maker software creates card and label in few mouse clicks using card and label templates. Efficient ID card maker and CD label designer software provides option to save a design as a template for future use.Features:* Efficient and reliable CD label designer and identity card maker software provides attractive and interactive graphical interface for the windows end users.* Powerful CD label creator and business card designer software allow user to generate label and cards without any technical skill.* Innovative CD label creator software designs ID cards, tags, coupons and labels having any size and shape including rectangular and rounded rectangular efficiently.

[read more]

Free Product Label Maker
(Office Apps)
Easy to operate label designer software generates labels for garments and products with barcode facility. Innovative barcode label designer software provides convenient solution for generating labels for small, large and medium size organization. Affordable card and label maker software facilitates to generate beautiful cards and labels for different purposes in few simple steps. Efficient and reliable identity card and label maker software provides option to save a label design into different image file formats including gif, jpeg and jpg. Expertise CD label maker software generates beautiful label designs using graphical objects including line, rectangle, text, rectangle, circle, and ellipse. Specialized CD label and discount card designer software facilitates to generate bulk labels and cards using sequential value series, random series and constant value series techniques. Efficient CD label maker software facilitates print preview option to visualize actual printing. Specially designed CD label creator software facilitates to generate barcode labels and cards using linear and 2D barcode fonts. Innovative CD label and card maker software facilitates to import a design from any windows application including MS-word, MS-excel and MS-paint. Reliable and simple ID card and CD label maker software creates card and label in few mouse clicks using card and label templates. Efficient ID card maker and CD label designer software provides option to save a design as a template for future use.Features:* Efficient and reliable CD label designer and identity card maker software provides attractive and interactive graphical interface for the windows end users.* Powerful CD label creator and business card designer software allow user to generate label and cards without any technical skill.* Innovative CD label creator software designs ID cards, tags, coupons and labels having any size and shape including rectangular and rounded rectangular efficiently.
